## Quality Gates

### Pre-Development Gates
- [ ] Requirements are clear and testable
- [ ] Design is reviewed and approved
- [ ] Test plan is created and approved
- [ ] Environment is set up and validated

### Development Gates
- [ ] Code reviews are completed
- [ ] Unit tests are written and passing
- [ ] Code quality standards are met
- [ ] Security checks are passed

### Pre-Release Gates
- [ ] All tests are executed and passing
- [ ] Performance benchmarks are met
- [ ] Security requirements are met
- [ ] Accessibility requirements are met
- [ ] Documentation is complete and accurate

### Post-Release Gates
- [ ] Release monitoring is active
- [ ] User feedback is collected and analyzed
- [ ] Performance metrics are monitored
- [ ] Issues are tracked and resolved

## Bug Management

### Bug Classification

| Severity | Description | Response Time |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| Critical | [Description] | [Time] |
| High | [Description] | [Time] |
| Medium | [Description] | [Time] |
| Low | [Description] | [Time] |

### Bug Reporting Template

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Bug ID | [Format] |
| Title | [Description] |
| Description | [Description] |
| Severity | [Severity] |
| Priority | [Priority] |
| Environment | [Description] |
| Steps to Reproduce | [Steps] |
| Expected Results | [Results] |
| Actual Results | [Results] |
| Attachments | [Files] |
| Reporter | [Name] |
| Assigned To | [Name] |
| Status | [Status] |

### Bug Tracking Workflow

1. **Bug Report**: User or QA reports bug
2. **Triage**: QA lead triages bug
3. **Assignment**: Bug assigned to appropriate team
4. **Fix**: Team fixes bug
5. **Verification**: QA verifies fix
6. **Closure**: Bug is closed

## Performance Testing

### Performance Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|------------|

| Load Time | [Target] | [Tool] |

### Performance Testing Tools

| Tool | Purpose | Usage |
|------|---------|-------|
| | | |

### Performance Testing Process

1. **Baseline**: Establish performance baseline
2. **Test Design**: Design performance tests
3. **Test Execution**: Execute performance tests
4. **Analysis**: Analyze performance results
5. **Optimization**: Optimize based on results
6. **Validation**: Validate improvements

### Security Test Types

| Test Type | Description | Tools |

### Security Testing Process

1. **Scanning**: Perform security scans
2. **Analysis**: Analyze security findings
3. **Remediation**: Address security issues
4. **Validation**: Validate security fixes
5. **Monitoring**: Ongoing security monitoring
